chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-5720 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s)  For orders as to non-prosecution 26.02.2026 None present for the petitioner M/s. Hakim Ali Shaikh and Sageer Ahmed Abbasi, Additional Advocates General, Sindh alongwith SI Muhammad Israr Khan, P.S Kalakot, Lyari Division City, Karachi ---------------------- None present for the petitioner, same has been the case since inception of this petition. It appears either purpose for which this petition was filed has been served or the petitioner has lost interest in the proceedings, therefore, she as well as her counsel have chosen to remain absent instead of pursuing it vigilantly. Consequently, this petition in view of the above position, as well as on absence of the petitioner and her counsel, is dismissed in default. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro
